name: VNC Remote Access (WinVNC / RealVNC / TightVNC)
categoryDescription: Network configuration, remote access tools, and network connection history.
description: Registry artifacts for VNC server and client variants — server configuration, viewer connection MRU, and hook preferences.
forensic_value: Server presence = remote access capability (legit IT or attacker backdoor). MRU reveals lateral movement destinations. Server config shows authentication strength and non-default ports.
